finalized_plan.description: Use a web search to locate the NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day entry from the first week of August 2015 that shows the lights of a city on the horizon
From the APOD entry, identify the city depicted and determine the namesake individual after whom the city is named
Research Chicago’s landmark building that carries the namesake of that individual, confirming which building is being referenced
Investigate the architectural history of that Chicago landmark to identify the architectural firm that designed it and verify the firm’s official name as of June 2023
Extract the first name that appears in the official name of the architectural firm
Provide the extracted first name as the final answer using the final_answer tool

root_cause_reasoning: The agent fabricated the answer without performing web search
